    "Installed rebar does not match the specified bar size per the placing drawings and bar schedule.",
    "Deformation count and/or size differ from the approved submittal and placing drawings.",
    "Wrong bar size reduces structural capacity and violates contract documents and code requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop placement/concrete pour in affected area until rebar is corrected.",
    "Remove and replace non-conforming rebar with the correct bar size per the placing drawings.",
    "Submit an NCR/RFI documenting the discrepancy and corrective action.",
    "Re-inspect and obtain third-party approval before proceeding."
  ],
  "rationale": "ACI 318 and ACI 117 require reinforcement to be placed in accordance with the contract documents and approved shop/placing drawings. A wrong bar size is a non-compliant, installed-defective condition that compromises the structural design and must be rejected at the inspection stage.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 318 - Building Code Requirements for Structural Concrete",
    "ACI 117 - Specifications for Tolerances for Concrete Construction and Materials",
    "Approved placing drawings and bar schedule"
  ]
}
